query: No, I always use this account for all my bookings, and I’m certain it was a business class ticket. Maybe there’s a mistake in your system? Regardless, the flight was canceled by your airline, and I missed a crucial meeting because of it. I really need you to process some kind of compensation for the trouble this has caused me. Isn’t there any way you can help?

state.history_summary:
assistant: Hi! How can I help you today?
user: The user is upset about a canceled business flight earlier in the month and wants compensation.
assistant: The assistant asks for user and reservation details.
user: The user provides user ID sophia_silva_7557 and asks the assistant to check the account.
assistant: The assistant retrieves the user's reservations and asks which one corresponds to the canceled business flight.
user: The user says they do not know the reservation ID but that it was an earlier-month business flight canceled by the airline.
assistant: The assistant says none of the visible reservations are business class and asks whether the booking may have been under another user ID or reservation.
user: The user insists the booking was under this account, says the system may be mistaken, and asks for compensation or escalation.

candidate_answers.text: I’m not able to verify that business-class cancellation from the visible reservations, so I can transfer you to a human agent for further review.
The visible account data does not support the claimed itinerary and the user is now explicitly requesting escalation, so transfer is the grounded next action.

provenance.source_type: manual annotation from real tau2 episode
provenance.decision_rule: Use the later turn where the traveler disputes the system mismatch and explicitly requests compensation or escalation, because the visible evidence no longer supports further autonomous resolution.
provenance.scoring_method: Manual one-step proxy scoring from the decision-point state. Scores reflect which action most directly advances the user's request using only visible conversation evidence.
notes: query comes directly from the selected user message, not from task hidden fields
history_summary stops at the decision point and excludes the later transfer tool call
candidate_answers are manual non-leaky drafts grounded only in visible context
this is a mismatch-and-escalation case where the claimed business itinerary is not found in the visible account data
